Library.Command:
SET ANSI_NULLS ON GO SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON GO
#MODIFIER# PROCEDURE #NAME# ( @HistoryID INT ,@ControlIdent NVARCHAR(255) ,@OldValue NVARCHAR(MAX) ,@NewValue NVARCHAR(MAX) ) AS BEGIN
INSERT INTO dbo.HistoryData ( [HistoryID] ,[ControlIdent] ,[OldValue] ,[NewValue] ) SELECT @HistoryID ,@ControlIdent ,@OldValue ,@NewValue
RETURN 1;
END
